# Bumping Pipelines CLI to `0.17.0`

**yhakbar** commented *Jul 9, 2024*

Note that two significant changes are brought about via this update:

## Minimum Supported Version of Terragrunt set to `v0.59.7` 
The minimum required version of Terragrunt has increased from `v0.59.5` to `v0.59.7`. This is the case due to a bug with Terragrunt that made it so that `get_aws_account_id` did not work with dynamic authentication.

While a breaking change, users should be heavily encouraged to move to this version of Pipelines workflows, and it should remain on the `v2` line of `pipelines-workflows`. A note encouraging users to upgrade directly to `v0.59.7` of Terragrunt has been placed on the release notes for [v2.0.0](https://github.com/gruntwork-io/pipelines-workflows/releases/tag/v2.0.0).

## ModulesAdded Optimization
An optimization has been introduced that consolidates multiple `ModuleAdded` updates into a single `ModulesAdded` update whenever possible. This optimization reduces the GitHub Actions costs incurred when introducing a large number of simultaneously added resources in a single pull request. It also ensures that the Terragrunt Directed Acyclic Graph (the DAG) is respected when ordering the provisioning of many resources in concert.
<br />
